reasoning: The primary limiter for Koren is poor lactate clearance leading to a significant drop in power from 5 to 20 minutes. This workout will address this by incorporating over-under intervals that simulate the steady climbs of the Alpine Loop and build the necessary fatigue resistance. Given the last ride was at 67% FTP, this session will be a step-up in intensity and specificity.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 5 x 8-minute over-unders: 6 minutes at 201-218W, 2 minutes at 242-256W. Maintain smooth power.

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
